title: The Engineered Collapse of the Black Family
tagline: Do you ever wonder why the Black family is dysfunctional?
description: A case file, not a complaint. Through declassified government records, federal court settlements, and hard data, Cedrick Carter traces every mechanism used to systematically dismantle Black households in America — from welfare policies designed to push fathers out, to drug laws written with a racial gap built right in, to the media playbook that programmed a generation for failure. Layer by layer, the evidence stacks into one undeniable picture: what looks like a cultural problem is actually an engineered one.

title: Human in the Loop: AI Reviewer
tagline: The future of work isn't about producing output — it's about reviewing it.
description: As generative AI makes content creation essentially free, the most valuable skill in the economy shifts to verification: knowing what to trust, what to reject, and why it matters. Human in the Loop makes the case that AI Reviewers — the accountable humans standing between AI output and the real world — are the most consequential new professional class of the decade. From hospitals and law firms to banks and newsrooms, organizations are learning the hard way that unreviewed AI output creates legal liability, reputational damage, and real harm at scale. This book shows you what the role actually looks like, what it pays, and how to build the domain expertise, credentials, and career capital to become one of the professionals the AI economy cannot function without.

title: Patterns of Power
tagline: The Fibonacci sequence runs through your decisions. Here's why.
description: An unexpected tour through mathematics, psychology, and human behavior — revealing the hidden patterns that govern our choices, relationships, and outcomes. Part science, part philosophy, entirely practical.

title: Self-Sabotage Decoded
tagline: You're the only thing standing in your way.
description: An unflinching examination of the unconscious behaviors that destroy momentum — avoidance, perfectionism, self-handicapping, imposter spirals — and the exact cognitive rewiring methods to eliminate them permanently.

title: Daily Wins
tagline: Freedom is built one deliberate day at a time.
description: A minimalist operating system for compounding small victories into total life transformation. Anti-hustle, pro-results. The system that removes the need for motivation by engineering your environment.

title: Memory & Identity
tagline: What you remember shapes who you become.
description: Cutting-edge research on episodic memory, narrative identity, and gender differences in recall — distilled into a framework for understanding why you are who you are, and how to deliberately reshape that story.
